sourcePrompt: An A-1 Skyraider "Spad", a burly single-engine attack aircraft about twelve meters long, sitting tail-low on taildragger gear. A big radial engine cowl with a four-bladed propeller fills the nose, a framed bubble canopy sits over mid-fuselage, and straight broad wings carry rows of underwing hardpoints loaded with bombs and rockets. A tall rounded tail fin finishes a deep-bellied fuselage that looks built to haul. Navy gray over olive, rugged and heavy-shouldered.
